title: Sejarah Melayu: The Malay Annals
description: The national chronicle of the Malay world — tracing the sultans of Melaka from Alexander the Great to the Portuguese conquest.
introduction: The national chronicle of the Malay world — tracing the sultans of Melaka from Alexander the Great to the Portuguese conquest.

translation.text: In the land of Palembang there was a king descended from Iskandar Zulkarnain. His descendants crossed the sea and founded Melaka. The city grew until it was the greatest port in all the seas.
